heading: Wigs & Medical Wig Solutions in Fresno, California
parts: Private, Luxury, Natural-Looking Wig Experiences at Studio One Hair Design in partnership with Maven Mane & Co.®

heading: Where Confidence Meets Compassion
parts: Hair loss can feel overwhelming, whether it’s caused by medical treatment, hormonal changes, stress, or genetics. At Studio One Hair Design, we’ve created a private, elevated experience where you can breathe, feel supported, and explore solutions that bring your confidence back without pressure, judgment, or confusion. Here, you’re not “buying a wig.” You’re reclaiming the way you want to feel every single day.

heading: Your journey begins with a one-on-one appointment designed to be relaxed, informative, and empowering.
parts: In our private fitting space, you’ll receive:
A warm welcome and an open conversation
We’ll talk through your challenges, goals, and lifestyle so we can guide you toward the most natural and confidence-building solution.

This helps us determine whether a luxury or medical-grade wig is best for you, or if you may actually get a better, more seamless result with extensions instead. Every woman’s hair journey is different, and we’ll help you choose what truly fits your needs.
For wig candidates, we take detailed measurements to ensure comfort and security.
We design a look that feels natural, effortless, and true to you.
Especially for women experiencing hair loss.
Many medical wigs can be covered with proper documentation through Maven Mane & Co.
So you always know exactly what to expect.

heading: How Our Partnership With Maven Mane & Co.® Works
parts: You get the best of both worlds: Studio One’s artistry + Maven Mane’s medical-grade expertise.
Ongoing maintenance to keep your wig looking its best
Construction of luxury and medical-grade wigs
Structural repairs such as: Lace replacements
This partnership ensures premium craftsmanship , medical accuracy, and Studio One’s signature touch on every finished piece.

parts: Each option is designed to meet you exactly where you are in your hair journey:
For everyday wear, long-term confidence, and a natural, seamless look.
